Descriptions.ShortDescription: Watches N.I.N.A. AutoFocus reports and posts V-curve graphs to Discord, Telegram, Slack, and email.
Descriptions.LongDescription:
AutoFocusGraphs delivers autofocus V-curve graphs and digests to multiple destinations from one N.I.N.A. plugin.

When N.I.N.A. writes a new autofocus report under %localappdata%\NINA\AutoFocus, the plugin renders a dark-mode ScottPlot graph and posts per-run reports, sequence digests, and session digests to every enabled channel.

## v0.1.0.2 highlights
- **Per-run send** (every run / every Nth / problems only) and **quiet hours** to cut overnight noise
- **Focus drift radar** chart with digest trend, preview, and overlay toggles
- **Compare to last (same filter)** V-curve overlay
- **Export AF night pack** zip for forums/support
- Exported V-curve / trend / drift PNGs at **2×** for sharper posts
- Updated pipeline flowchart (night pack, destinations, quiet hours / per-run send)

## v0.1.0.1 highlights
- Author/metadata cleanup and security hardening from community review
- Expanded **graph analysis hints** and **14 preview samples**
- Options UI: pipeline overview on the Graph tab only

## v0.1.0.0 highlights
- **Discord** webhook embeds (no bot required)
- **Telegram** Bot API (photo + optional JSON)
- **Slack** bot token + channel (external file upload API)
- **Email** SMTP with configurable subjects
- Quality gate, sequence/session digests, multi-destination posting

## Setup
1. Options → Plugins → AutoFocusGraphs → Graph tab → enable monitoring
2. Try Preview sample + Graph analysis hints to see curve observations
3. Enable one or more destinations (Discord / Telegram / Slack / Email) and run each Test button

## Compatibility
Built for N.I.N.A. 3.3 nightlies (.NET 10). Requires MinimumApplicationVersion 3.3.0.1047 or newer.
